title: Lead Revenue Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Zomato Restaurant Partners
jsonLd.description:
We at Zomato Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners!
